assertions.title: Repository and skill guidance consistently prescribe direct CLI usage

steps.expected: README prescribes direct `search-paper-cli` usage and documents global config plus ignored legacy env/runtime files.
steps.observed: README shows direct `search-paper-cli` commands, config at `~/.config/search-paper-cli/config.yaml` with `config.yml` fallback, per-key env precedence wording, and says `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE` / `.env` files do not participate in runtime config.

steps.expected: Repo guidance prefers direct CLI invocation and describes per-key env-over-config merge behavior.
steps.observed: AGENTS.md says to invoke `search-paper-cli` directly, documents config.yaml/config.yml discovery order, and states env wins per key with empty env values blocking fallback.

steps.expected: Skill docs prescribe plain `search-paper-cli ...` commands with global config and exact env-only runtime guidance.
steps.observed: Both files direct users to run `search-paper-cli` directly, mention `~/.config/search-paper-cli/config.yaml` / `config.yml`, describe per-key env override semantics, and state `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE` and `.env` inputs are ignored.

assertions.title: Shipped skill assets no longer expose the old wrapper flow as normal runtime behavior

steps.action: List `skills/search-paper/` contents and inspect helper assets.
steps.expected: No runtime wrapper script remains; any helper is install/locate-only.
steps.observed: Skill directory contains `SKILL.md`, `references/USAGE.md`, and `scripts/ensure-search-paper-cli.sh`; no `run-search-paper-cli.sh` or skill-local `.env` scaffold exists.

steps.expected: Helper only resolves/installs the binary and does not inject runtime config.
steps.observed: Helper usage text says runtime configuration is handled by `search-paper-cli` itself from process env plus `~/.config/search-paper-cli/config.yaml` / `config.yml`; script only resolves PATH/local bin/install fallback.

steps.action: Run repo-wide grep for wrapper and legacy env runtime instructions.
steps.expected: Shipped guidance should not present wrapper mediation as the normal runtime path.
steps.observed: Matches in shipped docs only describe ignoring `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE`/`.env` or preferring direct CLI use; remaining wrapper-related hits are in tests or historical validation assets, not shipped runtime guidance.

assertions.title: Installed skill context still uses plain direct CLI commands

steps.action: Copy `skills/search-paper` into an isolated outside-repo-style temp directory and place the built CLI on PATH.
steps.expected: Installed-skill-style context can be exercised without wrapper assets.
steps.observed: Copied skill tree contains only `SKILL.md`, `references/USAGE.md`, and `scripts/ensure-search-paper-cli.sh`; built CLI was exposed on PATH from the temp work area.

steps.action: Run `search-paper-cli sources --format json --source acm,ieee` from the copied skill dir with temp HOME config.yaml/config.yml and `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE` pointing at a legacy env file.
steps.expected: Direct command uses only process env plus global config files, ignoring wrapper mediation and legacy env-file input.
steps.observed: Command exited 0; stdout JSON showed `ieee.enabled=true` from temp `config.yaml`, `acm.enabled=false`, and the legacy env file did not enable ACM.

steps.action: Rerun the same direct command with `SEARCH_PAPER_ACM_API_KEY=env-acm` and execute `sh scripts/ensure-search-paper-cli.sh`.
steps.expected: Process env should merge with global config per key, and helper should only locate the binary.
steps.observed: Direct command exited 0 with both `acm.enabled=true` and `ieee.enabled=true`; helper exited 0 and printed the binary path only, with no runtime config injection.

summary: Tested 3 assertions via CLI/doc inspection. All 3 passed: shipped docs consistently prescribe direct `search-paper-cli` usage with global config plus per-key env overrides, the retained helper is install/locate-only, and an installed-skill-style copy still runs plain direct commands while ignoring `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE`.
